Name: Southeast Pacific
Selection rationale: Flat seafloor between PAR and Drake Passage; no major topographic features

Name: Central South Indian
Selection rationale: Quiescent ACC section between Kerguelen and SEIR meanders

Name: South Atlantic
Selection rationale: Flat abyssal plain south of the Mid-Atlantic Ridge; minimal topographic interaction

Name: CP–SEIR gap
Selection rationale: Transition zone between Campbell Plateau and Southeast Indian Ridge meanders
